code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut best = ""
mut best_len = -1
mut i = 0
while i < list.len(words)
  let w = match list.get(words, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(w)
  if n > best_len
    best = w
    best_len = n
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("longest=#{best}")
